title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, leading to potential data encryption, service disruptions, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and multi-factor authentication (MFA) for CI/CD pipelines and cloud environments.
Conduct a thorough review of CI/CD pipeline configurations and monitor for suspicious activity, such as unauthorized code changes or deployments.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored in isolated environments to prevent ransomware encryption.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability was found in Wavlink NU516U1 M16U1_V240425. Affected by this vulnerability is the...
description: A vulnerability was found in Wavlink NU516U1 M16U1_V240425. Affected by this vulnerability is the function wzdrepeater of the file /cgi-bin/adm.cgi. The manipulation of the argument wlan_bssid/sel_Automode/sel_EncrypTyp results in os command injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8189.

title: A vulnerability has been found in Wavlink NU516U1 M16U1_V240425. Affected is the function...
description: A vulnerability has been found in Wavlink NU516U1 M16U1_V240425. Affected is the function change_wifi_password of the file /cgi-bin/adm.cgi. The manipulation of the argument wl_channel/wl_Pass/EncrypType leads to os command injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands via the manipulation of specific parameters in the affected device's admin interface. This could result in unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or further compromise of the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available firmware updates or patches provided by the vendor to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the device's admin interface by implementing network segmentation and ensuring it is not exposed to the public internet.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and consider deploying intrusion detection/prevention systems to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability was determined in Wavlink NU516U1 M16U1_V240425. Affected by this issue is the...
description: A vulnerability was determined in Wavlink NU516U1 M16U1_V240425. Affected by this issue is the function wan of the file /cgi-bin/adm.cgi. This manipulation of the argument ppp_username/ppp_passwd/rwan_ip/rwan_mask/rwan_gateway is directly passed by the attacker/so we can control the ppp_username/ppp_passwd/rwan_ip/rwan_mask/rwan_gateway causes os command injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The vendor was contacted early ab

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8190.

title: The Activity Logs, User Activity Tracking, Multisite Activity Log from Logtivity plugin for...
description: The Activity Logs, User Activity Tracking, Multisite Activity Log from Logtivity plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass to Information Disclosure in versions up to, and including, 3.3.6. This is due to a logic flaw in the verifyAuthorization method where requests without an Authorization header skip Bearer token validation and fall through to an unconditional return true statement, bypassing all authentication checks. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to a

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8198.

title: A vulnerability was detected in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. This affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was detected in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. This affects the function ogs_sbi_client_send_via_scp_or_sepp in the library lib/sbi/client.c of the component NF. Performing a manipulation results in out-of-bounds read. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The patch is named d5bc487fcf9ea87d2b03f2ef95123af344773bfb. It is suggested to install a patch to address this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Open5GS could allow remote attackers to perform out-of-bounds reads, potentially leading to data leakage, service disruption, or further exploitation depending on the environment. This poses a risk to critical network functions in 5G infrastructure.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the patch d5bc487fcf9ea87d2b03f2ef95123af344773bfb to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough security audit of Open5GS systems to ensure no additional vulnerabilities are present.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity that may indicate exploitation attempts.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in UGREEN CM933 1.1.59.4319. The impacted element is...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in UGREEN CM933 1.1.59.4319. The impacted element is an unknown function of the component Administrative Interface. Such manipulation leads to missing authentication. The attack requires being on the local network. You should upgrade the affected component. The vendor replied: "We have successfully confirmed and reproduced the issue. We take this matter very seriously and have incorporated the fix into our development schedule. The issue is scheduled to

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the UGREEN CM933 Administrative Interface allows an attacker on the local network to bypass authentication, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive configurations or data. This could result in data breaches, service disruptions, or further exploitation of the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately restrict access to the affected device by implementing network segmentation and limiting access to trusted IP ranges.
Upgrade the UGREEN CM933 firmware to the latest version as soon as the vendor releases the patch addressing CVE-2026-8185.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and implement additional logging to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: A flaw has been found in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. This impacts the function _gtpv1_u_recv_cb of the...
description: A flaw has been found in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. This impacts the function _gtpv1_u_recv_cb of the file src/upf/gtp-path.c of the component UPF. Executing a manipulation can lead to resource consumption. The attack may be performed from remote. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8187.

title: Some Hikvision switch products (discontinued since December 2023) are vulnerable to authenticated...
description: Some Hikvision switch products (discontinued since December 2023) are vulnerable to authenticated remote command execution due to insufficient input validation. Attackers with valid credentials can exploit this flaw by sending crafted packets containing malicious commands to affected devices, leading to arbitrary command execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3828.

title: Some EZVIZ products utilize older versions of cloud feature modules with legacy API interfaces,...
description: Some EZVIZ products utilize older versions of cloud feature modules with legacy API interfaces, which pose a data transmission risk. Attackers can exploit this by eavesdropping on network requests to obtain data.Users are advised to upgrade the app to the latest version and enable the video encryption feature.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use of legacy API interfaces in some EZVIZ products poses a risk of data interception during transmission. Attackers could exploit this vulnerability to eavesdrop on sensitive information, potentially leading to unauthorized access or data breaches.
recommended_actions: Upgrade the EZVIZ app to the latest version immediately to ensure compatibility with updated cloud feature modules.
Enable the video encryption feature in the app settings to secure data transmission.
Conduct a network security audit to identify and mitigate any additional vulnerabilities related to IoT devices.

title: There is an Access Control Vulnerability in some HikCentral Professional versions. This could...
description: There is an Access Control Vulnerability in some HikCentral Professional versions. This could allow an unauthenticated user to obtain the admin permission.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1749.

title: An improper authorization vulnerability in HCL BigFix WebUI allows an authenticated user without...
description: An improper authorization vulnerability in HCL BigFix WebUI allows an authenticated user without Master Operator privileges to access internal data (site names, versions, and configuration variables) and bypass privilege requirements via unprotected endpoints lacking adequate security headers.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-15633.

title: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by a path traversal vulnerability resulting in DOS...
description: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by a path traversal vulnerability resulting in DOS by attempting extraction of web application PHP files, failed .zip extraction results in deletion of the file and a DOS condition. Successful exploitation requires Teacher or higher privileges. Exploitation could result in loss of availability of the web application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The path traversal vulnerability in Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 could allow an attacker with Teacher or higher privileges to delete critical PHP files during failed .zip extractions, leading to a denial-of-service (DOS) condition and rendering the web application unavailable.
affected_industries: Small to medium-sized enterprises using Gibbon for resource management
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Gibbon version v30.0.01 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to Teacher or higher privileges to only trusted users and review privilege assignments.
Implement regular backups of the web application and database to ensure quick recovery in case of exploitation.

title: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by a local file inclusion vulnerability resulting in...
description: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by a local file inclusion vulnerability resulting in RCE by changing the report archive directory and forcing interpretation of a user provided .zip as PHP. Successful exploitation requires Teacher or higher privileges. Exploitation could result in compromise of the underlying web server.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8208.

title: A missing authorization vulnerability in HCL BigFix WebUI allows an authenticated user without...
description: A missing authorization vulnerability in HCL BigFix WebUI allows an authenticated user without proper permissions to view sensitive environmental information via direct URL access to the unauthorized page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-15634.

title: The LatePoint plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Account Takeover via Weak Password Recovery...
description: The LatePoint plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Account Takeover via Weak Password Recovery Mechanism in the unauthenticated guest booking flow in versions up to, and including, 5.5.0 This is due to the save_connected_wordpress_user() function propagating a LatePoint customer's email address to its linked WordPress user account via wp_update_user() without any ownership verification, combined with the guest booking flow's ability to overwrite an existing customer's email through phone-based

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the LatePoint plugin for WordPress allows unauthenticated attackers to take over user accounts by exploiting a weak password recovery mechanism. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data, disruption of services, and potential reputational damage for affected organizations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the LatePoint plugin to a patched version (if available) or disable the plugin until a fix is released.
Implement additional verification mechanisms for password recovery, such as email or multi-factor authentication (MFA).
Regularly review and audit user account activity for signs of unauthorized access or suspicious behavior.

title: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by an authenticated SQL Injection vulnerability by...
description: Gibbon versions before v30.0.01 are affected by an authenticated SQL Injection vulnerability by abusing the  Tracking/graphing https://github.com/GibbonEdu/core/blob/c431e25fdc874adece5d2dc7e408e9aa2d1abadb/modules/Tracking/graphing.php#L145  feature. Successful exploitation requires Teacher or higher privileges. Exploitation could result in unintended read/write activities to the underlying database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users with Teacher or higher privileges to execute SQL injection attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, data manipulation, or disruption of database integrity. This could compromise sensitive student, teacher, and administrative data.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Gibbon to version v30.0.01 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and restrict user privileges to ensure only necessary access is granted to Teacher or higher roles.
Conduct a security audit of the database to identify and remediate any unauthorized changes or data breaches.

title: PgBouncer before 1.25.2 did not perform an appropriate authorization check for the KILL_CLIENT...
description: PgBouncer before 1.25.2 did not perform an appropriate authorization check for the KILL_CLIENT admin command. All users with access to the administration console (which itself requires authorization) could run this command. It would have been correct to allow only users listed in the admin_users parameter.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6667.

title: A possible null pointer reference in PgBouncer before 1.25.2 could lead to a crash, if a server...
description: A possible null pointer reference in PgBouncer before 1.25.2 could lead to a crash, if a server sends an error response without SQLSTATE field.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6666.

title: The SCRAM code in PgBouncer before 1.25.2 did not check the return value of strlcat() correctly...
description: The SCRAM code in PgBouncer before 1.25.2 did not check the return value of strlcat() correctly when building the contents of the SCRAM client-final-message. A malicious backend that sends a SCRAM server-final-message with a long nonce can trigger a stack overflow.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in PgBouncer's SCRAM authentication mechanism can be exploited by a malicious backend to trigger a stack overflow, potentially leading to remote code execution or denial of service. This poses a significant risk to systems relying on PgBouncer for database connection pooling.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade PgBouncer to version 1.25.2 or later to address the vulnerability.
Review and monitor logs for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation, particularly related to SCRAM authentication.
Implement network segmentation and access controls to limit exposure of PgBouncer to untrusted backends.

title: An integer overflow in network packet parsing code in PgBouncer before 1.25.2 bypasses a boundary...
description: An integer overflow in network packet parsing code in PgBouncer before 1.25.2 bypasses a boundary check and can lead to a crash. An unauthenticated remote attacker can crash PgBouncer with a malformed SCRAM authentication packet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6664.

title: CVE-2026-7604 - A vulnerability was identified in JeecgBoot up to 3.9.1. This affects the function OpenApiController
description: A vulnerability was identified in JeecgBoot up to 3.9.1. This affects the function OpenApiController.add/OpenApiController.call of the file OpenApiController.java of the component OpenApi Service. Such manipulation of the argument originUrl database leads to server-side request forgery. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. It is suggested to upgrade the affected component. The vendor confirmed the issue and will provide a fix in the upcoming release.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7604.

title: CVE-2026-7603 - A vulnerability was determined in JeecgBoot up to 3.9.1. Affected by this issue is the function chec
description: A vulnerability was determined in JeecgBoot up to 3.9.1. Affected by this issue is the function checkPathTraversalBatch of the file FileDownloadUtils.jav of the component LoadFile Endpoint. This manipulation of the argument files causes server-side request forgery. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The affected component should be upgraded. The vendor confirmed the issue and will provide a fix in the upcoming release.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in JeecgBoot up to version 3.9.1 allows for server-side request forgery (SSRF) via the LoadFile Endpoint. This could enable attackers to access internal systems, exfiltrate sensitive data, or pivot to other systems within the network. The exploit is publicly available, increasing the likelihood of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade JeecgBoot to the latest version once the vendor releases the patch addressing CVE-2026-7603.
Implement input validation and sanitization for the 'files' argument in the LoadFile Endpoint to mitigate potential exploitation.
Monitor network traffic for unusual or unauthorized outbound requests that may indicate SSRF attempts and review logs for signs of exploitation.

title: CVE-2026-7458 - The User Verification by PickPlugins plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authentication bypass in
description: The User Verification by PickPlugins plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authentication bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.46. This is due to the use of a loose PHP comparison operator to validate OTP codes in the "user_verification_form_wrap_process_otpLogin" function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to log in as any user with a verified email address, such as an administrator, by submitting a "true" OTP value.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7458.

title: CVE-2026-6963 - The WP Mail Gateway plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access due to a missing capab
description: The WP Mail Gateway plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access due to a missing capability check on the wmg_save_provider_config AJAX action in all versions up to, and including, 1.8. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to update SMTP settings and redirect mail which can be used for privilege escalation by triggering a password reset email and using that to access and administrator's account.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6963.

title: CVE-2026-6446 - The My Social Feeds – Social Feeds Embedder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Informat
description: The My Social Feeds – Social Feeds Embedder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to and including 1.0.4 via the 'ttp_get_accounts' AJAX action. This is due to the complete absence of authorization checks (no capability verification) and nonce verification in the get_accounts() function, which returns the full contents of the 'ttp_tiktok_accounts' WordPress option. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to retrieve sensitive TikTok OAuth credentials, including access_token and refresh_token values, that belong to administrator-connected TikTok accounts, enabling them to impersonate the site owner when interacting with the TikTok API.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6446.

title: CVE-2026-4882 - The User Registration Advanced Fields plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads d
description: The User Registration Advanced Fields plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due to missing file type validation in the 'URAF_AJAX::method_upload' function in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.20. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files on the affected site's server which may make remote code execution possible. Note: The vulnerability can only be exploited if a "Profile Picture" field is added to the form.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4882.

title: CVE-2026-4658 - The Essential Blocks – Page Builder Gutenberg Blocks, Patterns & Templates plugin for WordPress is v
description: The Essential Blocks – Page Builder Gutenberg Blocks, Patterns & Templates plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the className, classHook, and blockId attributes in the Add to Cart block (essential-blocks/add-to-cart) in all versions up to, and including, 6.0.4. This is due to insufficient output escaping in the render_callback() function where these attributes are placed into class and data-id HTML attributes using raw sprintf() and implode() without esc_attr() escaping. While the outer wrapper div uses get_block_wrapper_attributes() which properly escapes, the inner divs do not. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4658.

title: CVE-2025-14726 - The Widgets for Social Photo Feed plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data
description: The Widgets for Social Photo Feed plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data and modification of data due to a missing capability check on the '/trustindex_feed_hook_instagram/troubleshooting' and '/trustindex_feed_hook_instagram/submit-data' REST API endpoints in all versions up to, and including, 1.8. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to access and update plugin settings.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14726.

title: CVE-2026-7638 - The App Builder – Create Native Android & iOS Apps On The Flight plugin for WordPress is vulnerable
description: The App Builder – Create Native Android & iOS Apps On The Flight plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference  in all versions up to and including 5.6.0. This is due to missing authorization validation in the `upload_avatar()` function, which accepts an attacker-controlled `user_id` parameter from the POST request body and uses it to update user meta without verifying that the authenticated requester owns or has permission to modify the target account. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to overwrite the profile avatar of any arbitrary user on the site, including administrators, by supplying a target `user_id` in the request body to the `/wp-json/app-builder/v1/upload-avatar` endpoint.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7638.

title: CVE-2026-7602 - A vulnerability was found in JeecgBoot up to 3.9.1. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown fun
description: A vulnerability was found in JeecgBoot up to 3.9.1. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /sys/fillRule/edit of the component FillRuleUtil Component. The manipulation of the argument ruleClass results in improper authorization. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made public and could be used. You should upgrade the affected component. The vendor confirmed the issue and will provide a fix in the upcoming release.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7602.

title: CVE-2026-7209 - The Simple Link Directory plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the
description: The Simple Link Directory plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the plugin's `qcopd-directory` shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 8.9.2. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user supplied attributes such as `title_font_size`. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7209.

title: CVE-2026-6378 - The Maxi Blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `/wp-json/
description: The Maxi Blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `/wp-json/maxi-blocks/v1.0/style-card` REST API endpoint in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.9 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping of the `sc_styles` parameter. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts that execute on every page where the plugin's style card styles are loaded, including across the entire WordPress admin panel.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6378.

title: CVE-2026-7601 - A vulnerability has been found in Open5GS up to 2.7.6. Affected is an unknown function of the file s
description: A vulnerability has been found in Open5GS up to 2.7.6. Affected is an unknown function of the file src/amf/gmm-handler.c of the component AMF. The manipulation of the argument reg_type leads to denial of service. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. Upgrading to version 2.7.7 is able to address this issue. The identifier of the patch is ebc66942b6f8f1fab2d640e71cf4e9f1a423b426. It is advisable to upgrade the affected component.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7601.

title: CVE-2026-43824 - In Argo CD 3.2.0 before 3.2.11 and 3.3.0 before 3.3.9, ServerSideDiff allows reading cleartext Kuber
description: In Argo CD 3.2.0 before 3.2.11 and 3.3.0 before 3.3.9, ServerSideDiff allows reading cleartext Kubernetes Secret data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-43824.

title: CVE-2026-7600 - A flaw has been found in ArtMin96 yii2-mcp-server 1.0.2. This impacts the function yii_command_help/
description: A flaw has been found in ArtMin96 yii2-mcp-server 1.0.2. This impacts the function yii_command_help/yii_execute_command of the file src/index.ts of the component MCP Interface. Executing a manipulation can lead to os command injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7600.
